rationale: Section 11.133 references Section 11.13 only for the definition of "residence homestead," not for the dollar exemption amount in 11.13(b). The proposed change to the 11.13(b) dollar amount does not affect 11.133's total-exemption operative text.
quote: "Residence homestead" has the meaning assigned by Section 11.13.
_note: No operative interaction between the proposed $140k→$200k change in §11.13(b) and §11.133, which provides a total appraised value exemption independent of the §11.13(b) dollar figure.
